历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 36701 → 33617 → 37098 → 19735 → 25022. In 2024, due to the first year of the new Gaokao (Physics Category), the ranking significantly advanced to 19735, rebounding to 25022 in 2025, with considerable fluctuations in the past two years; the 2025 baseline is approximately 25022. The university's enrollment plan in Yunnan for Physics Category was 143 in 2021, 142 in 2022, 135 in 2023, 154 in 2024, and 188 in 2025, showing an expansion trend; the 2026 plan is 186, a slight reduction of 2 (-1.1%) compared to 2025, intensifying competition slightly.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; the Soft Science main ranking has continuously risen from 144th in 2021 to 87th in 2026, with a significant improvement in recent years, enhancing the university's comprehensive strength and recognition; in 2023, there was a somewhat negative public opinion incident due to a teacher's non-cooperation with nucleic acid testing, while in 2024, the reputation turned neutral/mixed (discussions triggered by rising admission scores); Douyin popularity is relatively high (overall rank 32), with medium-to-high short video exposure, and application attention has increased; no obvious record of admission gaps; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, the university features agriculture, forestry, marine science, and law, with related majors occupying a certain proportion in enrollment.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation are highly popular and recommended, closely related to the university's Physics Category enrollment majors (Computer Science, Electronic Information, Automation, Artificial Intelligence, etc.), driving up competition for related majors; the total number of examinees in the province in 2026 is approximately 377,900, a significant increase from about 285,700 in 2025, with an estimated Physics Category of about 226,700 based on historical proportions, intensifying competition; Hainan University is located in Haikou, Hainan Province, with some regional appeal to candidates from Southwest China; the university's enrollment proportion in Yunnan is about 2%-3% (approximately 2.2% in 2025), at a medium-low level, with stable cross-province application popularity.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the historical ranking baseline of 25022 in 2025, a slight reduction of 2 in the 2026 enrollment plan, a significant increase in the total number of examinees in the province, and the continuous rise in the university's ranking, it is expected that competition in the Physics Category in 2026 will slightly intensify, with the ranking moving slightly backward from the 2025 baseline; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 25062, with a range of 24562–25562.
